description.description: Detailed information about the certificate, such as its purpose or usage context.

labels.description: Key-value pairs for organizing and categorizing the certificate; must be compliant with Google's labeling requirements.

location.description: Specifies the geographic location where the certificate will be created, such as a Google Cloud region or multi-region.

managed.description: Specifies whether the certificate is a managed certificate automatically provisioned and renewed by Google Certificate Manager.

name.description: Specifies the name of the certificate, which must be unique within the project and region, and comply with RFC1035 naming conventions.

scope.description: Specifies the geographical scope for the certificate, either global or regional, determining where the certificate resources will be available.

self_managed.description: Defines the configuration for a self-managed SSL certificate, including the private key and certificate chain. Required for certificates not managed by Google.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for operations on the certificate, including create, update, and delete processes.
